good_retrieval_note: Chunks should mention counterfeit, fake, not authentic, or wrong product vs store-bought.
Surface defects, broken packaging, wrong formulation, clumps, leaks—not generic praise.

query: skin irritation rash or burn from product
good_retrieval_note: Safety reactions: rash, burn, irritation, allergic reaction.

query: product smells bad or chemical smell
good_retrieval_note: Odor complaints, chemical scent, gone bad.

query: not the same as store version quality difference
good_retrieval_note: Comparison to retail (e.g. Costco) or formula/texture differences.

query: shipping packaging arrived open or crushed
good_retrieval_note: Fulfillment damage, open box, crushed—not unrelated 5-star scent praise.
Expiry, old batch, dried out, shelf life.
Efficacy failure, doesn't last, doesn't work—not only positive family recommendations.

query: price too high for what you get
good_retrieval_note: Value complaints; may be sparse in review text—vector-only may drift to generic reviews.

query: charcoal chunks or texture problems in stick
good_retrieval_note: Specific texture defects mentioned in dataset (chunks, gritty, tears skin).

query: baking soda free deodorant that works
good_retrieval_note: Ingredient constraint + experience; hybrid helps lock ingredient tokens.

query: horrible customer experience with this purchase
good_retrieval_note: Negative purchase narrative; avoid pure 5-star generic satisfaction unless it matches.
Physical discomfort from application—exact words may appear in complaints.

query: duplicate duplicate order wrong item sent
good_retrieval_note: Wrong item, duplicate shipment—if absent in corpus, good retrieval should say little evidence.
Low-star narratives; parser may add rating filter when phrased as 1-star only—here 'negative' is broad.
